acceptedIds: ID card from Georgia Department of Driver Services
Georgia voter ID card (free from registrar's office)
exceptions: Voters without acceptable ID can cast a provisional ballot. They have up to 3 days after the election to provide ID or sign an affidavit.
provisionalBallotRules: Voters must provide acceptable ID or sign an affidavit within 3 business days after the election.
phonesAtPollsDetail: Georgia prohibits use of mobile devices to photograph or record ballots or voters inside polling places.
